title: Fragment: To Italy.
content:
As the sunrise to the night,
    As the north wind to the clouds,
    As the earthquake's fiery flight,
    Ruining mountain solitudes,
    Everlasting Italy,
    Be those hopes and fears on thee.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: To Italy.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
